guide:
📅 The 'Grand Loop' 5-Day Road Trip

🏁 Distance: ~310 km
🚗 Pace: Balanced
🏨 Bases: Molyvos (2n) + Skala Eressos (2n)
Day 1: Mytilene & The East Coast (15 km)
Pick up your car. Explore the Genovese castle and the neoclassical mansions of Mytilene.
📍 Stop: The Teriad Museum (modern art).
🛏️ Stay: Mytilene or Molyvos
Day 2: The Medieval North (62 km)
Head to the most beautiful village on the island. Walk the stone alleys under the wisteria.
📍 Stops: Molyvos Castle, sunset cocktails in Petra, and a dip in Eftalou Hot Springs.
🛏️ Stay: Molyvos
Day 3: Crossing the Moonscape (65 km)
Leave the green north for the volcanic west. The terrain becomes dramatic and dry.
📍 Stops: Ipsilou Monastery (perched on a volcano), Sigri Petrified Forest (UNESCO Site).
🛏️ Stay: Skala Eressos
Day 4: Skala Eressos Deep Dive (0 km)
Give the car a rest. Eressos is a world-famous bohemian hub built on the sand.
📍 Vibe: Yoga on the beach, wooden cafe platforms over the water, and the most inclusive atmosphere in Greece.
🛏️ Stay: Skala Eressos
Day 5: The Mountain & The Ouzo (105 km)
A long but beautiful drive back via the Gulf of Kalloni.
📍 Stops: Flamingo watching in Kalloni, the chestnut forests of Agiassos, and Plomari for the Ouzo Museum.
🏁 End: Mytilene Airport
💡 Pro Logic: By staying in Skala Eressos (Day 3 & 4), you save 5 hours of 'dead driving' time. It is the only way to truly experience the island's best sunset.
